name: King Ranch Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 can Condensed cream of chicken soup (10 3/4 oz)
2 cans Rotel Tomatoes & Green Chilies with Red Pepper Flakes (10 oz)
12 Soft corn tortillas, torn into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté green pepper and onion in melted butter until tender.
3. Stir in Rotel, cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, and cubed cooked chicken.
4. In a 13x9-inch baking dish, alternately layer tortillas, soup mixture, and cheese, repeating for 3 layers.
5. Bake for 40 minutes or until bubbling and heated through.
